heading: Tuesday Night
text: Showers likely; an early thunderstorm possible south; freezing rain possible near the international border. Lows from the mid 40s to mid 50s in the south, and mid 30s to mid 40s north, with some lower 30s far north. Winds 5 to 10 mph, from the north in northern areas, and from the southwest in southern areas.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of showers early; some freezing rain possible far north; then a chance of sprinkles or drizzle. Highs in the 40s to around 50 north, and 50s to around 60 in the south. Winds around 10 mph, from the northwest, or becoming so.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of a rain showers from Route 9 southward; chance of wintry mix over the southern Greens. Lows mainly in the upper 20s to lower 30s; some mid 20s far north, and some mid 30s far south. North to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.
